title: phacelia ivesiana f. glandulifera
intro: Phacelia ivesiana f. glandulifera is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the phacelia plant, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Phacelia ivesiana f. glandulifera include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
